name: Jet-Vac
description: Jet-Vac is a wingless Sky Baron who is one of the Air Skylanders in Skylanders: Giants. His Series 2 name is Turbo Jet-Vac and his Series 3 name is Full Blast Jet-Vac. He has a Legendary counterpart known as Legendary Jet-Vac. In Skylanders: SuperChargers, Jet-Vac is redesigned as a SuperCharger named Hurricane Jet-Vac and is given new abilities.
biography: Jet-Vac was the greatest, most daring flying ace in all of Windham. He was given his magical wings when he was young, as was the tradition for all Sky Barons. But when his homeland was raided, he chose to sacrifice his wings to a young mother so she could fly her children to safety. This act of nobility caught the attention of Master Eon, who sought out the young Sky Baron and presented him with a gift - a powerful vacuum device that would allow him to soar through the skies once again. Jet-Vac accepted the gift with gratitude, and now daringly fights evil alongside the other Skylanders.
personality: Noble and courageous, Jet-Vac always thinks of others before himself. Now a Skylander, he soars where even eagles never dare. In Full Blast, he's shown to be a bit of a defeatist, thinking his worth as a fighter is lost without a weapon. In Skylanders: Imaginators, Jet-Vac displays dedication in searching for what has been stolen from him, in his case, his lunch that was stored away within the Sky Fortress.

story.content: It's traditional for Sky Barons to be given their magical wings when they are young, and when Jet-Vac got his, he quickly demonstrated some amazing aerial skills. As the years passed, Jet-Vac became known as the most daring flying ace in all of Skylands. He swooped. He soared. He sailed through the air, amazing the people of his home town, Windham, and protecting them whenever danger reared its ugly head. Then one day, Windham was raided, Jet-Vac was horrified to see a young mother struggling to get her children away from danger. He was faced with a choice - either fly to safety himself, or give his wings to the mother so she and her children could make their escape. Of course, there was only one option the noble Jet-Vac was ever going to go with. He selflessly sacrificed his wings to save the others - and caught the attention of Master Eon in the process. While the feathered flight ace remains wingless to this day, Eon equipped him with a hearty vacuum-powered jet pack which more than makes up for it. Jet-Vac was the one who recruited a feathercat named Scratch into the Skylander ranks after hearing about her heroism at Cats Eye Mountain.

Jet-Vac was in a training session with Spyro, Drill Sergeant, and Trigger Happy generated by Master Eon. After the session ended with Spyro accidentally unleashing a jet of flames at Trigger Happy and Drill Sergeant, the Sky Baron noticed that Spyro was feeling down about not being able to master his Daybringer Flame technique, and Jet-Vac reassured Spyro that the dragon couldn't be good at everything. The Sky Baron later went with Spyro and Drill Sergeant to the Desert of Columns to save the Molekin, Diggs, from a strangely familiar giant troll. Kaos soon arrived, saving the day by 'vanquishing' the monster with a magic staff after claiming to have turned over a new leaf by defeating evil doers. When the Warrior Librarians of the Eternal Archives arrived at Eon's Citadel, Jet-Vac, along with Trigger Happy, jokingly complimented on Spyro's legendary status after the Lead Curator, Wiggleworth, recognized the young dragon and recalled reading Spyro's heroic exploits from the Scrolls of the Ancients. The Sky Baron stayed behind at the Citadel when the other present Skylanders went with the Librarians to protect the Eternal Archives, and he later helped his fellow Skylanders in repairing the Archive Walls after their battle with Kaos.

Jet-Vac was one of the Skylander attendees at the Skylanders Academy last day of school party, watching a rehabilitated Kaos handing out cotton candy. Four months later, dangerous sky rifts began popping up around Skylands and the Sky Baron was assigned by Spyro to go with Stealth Elf, Terrafin and Gill Grunt to Know-It-All Island to find out more about the Rift Engines that may be a solution to the incoming threat. Once at Know-It-All Island, the Skylanders and Flynn encountered Blobbers, who was sent by his village to learn about the strange rifts that were destroying everything across Skylands. A nearby Stone Head revealed to the group the history behind the Rift Engines and the fact that Kaos had awakened a power hidden long ago. Before the Stone Head could begin to tell the location of the Rift Engines, Kaos himself opened a rift and it consumed the island as soon as the Stone Head told a riddle to the Skylanders regarding the location of the Rift Engines. The Skylanders and their friends were soon rescued by non-Skylanders, Spitfire and Stormblade, who transported them all to safety with their vehicles. After getting acquainted with Spitfire, Stormblade, and other non-Skylander, Fiesta and Dive-Clops, Jet-Vac and the other Skylanders allowed the SuperChargers to help the Skylanders on their journey as there was no other available transportation. While trekking through Skylands, the Skylanders and SuperChargers figured out the Stone Head's riddle and came to the Whirlpool of Destiny where the Rift Engines were hidden in an underwater city. While Dive-Clops and Gill Grunt used the Dive Bomber to begin their search underwater, Jet-Vac and the other land Skylanders held back a group of Kaos' minions to buy their friends some time. As they were about to become overwhelmed, Gill Grunt and Dive-Clops succeeded in hauling the Rift Engines from the underwater depths. Jet-Vac, Stealth Elf and Terrafin were shocked at seeing Gill Grunt's SuperCharged form, who quickly instructed his three companions to unlock the chest and hope the Rift Engines inside chooses them. As they touched the Rift Engines, Terrafin, Stealth Elf and Jet-Vac were granted the powers of SuperChargers which transformed them, and they used their newfound abilities to drive off Kaos' minions. With the Rift Engines at their disposal, the Skylanders, and the newly-formed Skylander SuperChargers, began their adventure in stopping Kaos and his latest plan.

Jet-Vac came to the Skylanders after their battle with Kaos in Scholarville, reporting to them of a brainstorm that was ravaging Shellmont Shores. After retrieving the Vortex Destroyer from the Academy Library, he and the Skylanders headed on to Shellmont Shores to put a stop to Kaos and the brainstorm, successfully stopping the ravaging storm. Jet-Vac and the Skylander later came to Sky Fortress to take back a Sky Baron battleship that was overtaken by Vultures to combat the Guacamole Monster. During the seige on the Sky Fortress, the Sky Baron had noticed that someone had stolen his lunch and partly made it his mission to find whoever was responsible.

content: I like it! Rolls right off the beak!
Oh they're real; they're spectacular, and they're HUGE!
Well, laugh all you want, but I heard they can literally throw boulders!
I love it when I'm right!
That scoundrel wouldn't know a good deed if one came up and bopped him on the nose! He really ruffles my feathers!
What are you waiting for, old boy? You need to do something.
Ready to fight beak and claw. Tallyho!
Well, this will come in handy!
Say, what have we got here?
I'd hit myself if I were you!
I just need a second wind...!
My luck has flown the coop.
Were you raised in the wild?!

These scavenger creeps have completely taken over our battleship! And according to indulge report, even most of my lunch from the galleys mini fridge! So, I'll scout up ahead, enveloping the enemy in a classic pincer movement. Plus maybe I'll find the guy who stole my food! And make. Him. PAY.
You're the fool this time, Kaos! It was a trick and you fell for it!

trivia: Early in development, Jet-Vac was known by his concept names, Vac Eagle, Vacuum Eagle, and Airgle.
His name is a play on the word "jet pack".

Although Jet-Vac is male, he has been known to lay eggs in times of shock. No one knows if these hatch into little Sky Barons or not. This trait is featured in the Tall Tales trailer, the Just like SWAP Force trailer, and The Discovery trailer, and is a recurring trait in his Skylanders Academy counterpart.
In the trailers, Jet-Vac has a very thick Scottish accent, even mentioning haggis at one point in the Tall Tales E3 trailer. In-game, he speaks in a British accent.

During Giants's early development, Jet-Vac's abilities/upgrades were differently named and arranged. "Vac-Blaster" was replaced by an ability called "Vac-Fu," which entailed melee clawing attacks. "Fiester Fan" was replaced by an upgrade called "Turbo Jetpack." "Jet-Vac Jet Pack" was replaced by an upgrade called "Vacuum Force Air Blaster." "Vac Blaster 9000" was replaced by an upgrade called "Vack-Pack 9000." "Turbine Suction Gun" was replaced by an upgrade called "Hyper-Suck Mega Fan." "Piercing Winds" was replaced by an upgrade called "Vac-Fu; Eagle Claw." "Vac Master-Blaster 20X" was replaced by an upgrade called "Super Bird." "Super Suction Air Blaster" was replaced by an upgrade called "Elite Vac Gun Blade." "Flying Corkscrew" was replaced by an upgrade called "Super Suction Air Blaster."
His catchphrase is a pun on Shock and Awe. But on his single character pack, his catchphrase is erroneously marked as "Choc and Chic."
He slightly resembles a Secretary Bird and a Harpy Eagle.
He is the only Air Skylander before SWAP Force who cannot fly over water.
In New York Toy Fair 2012, his toy form has more silver details on his cannon and armor than his normal toy form.

During development he originally had a scratching ability and tornado dance as one of his attacks, but these were removed in the final release. He also had a different standing and running animations during development which were later reused in following games: His standing animation was used in Cloud Patrol and Lost Islands. His running animation was used in Swap Force and subsequent installments. Early in development, his vacuum ability could move both Chompy Pods and exploding hazard plants, causing the latter to regrow wherever he relocated them. In the alpha of Giants, taking damage often caused his gun to fly backward, unnaturally extending its cord.
After he obtains the Eagle Air Battle Armor upgrade, his color scheme slightly matches the color scheme of the NFL team, the Seattle Seahawks.
He and Gill Grunt are the only two Skylanders who fly using jet packs. They both, alongside Eruptor, are also the only Skylanders to appear in 5 versions (including Minis, but excluding alter egos).
In Skylanders: Swap Force, Jet-Vac's Eagle-Air Battle Gear Soul Gem will not change his appearance.
As a S3 figure, the color scheme of Full Blast Jet-Vac's outfit is crimson instead of blue, even if his new Wow Pow hasn't been purchased yet.
Pop Fizz and Jet-Vac always appear together on animated trailers. The two appear in more trailers then anyone else from their elements—Magic and Air.

Of all Skylanders, Jet-Vac is the only one that has more upgrades that consecutively change their appearance/weapons. Having three different guns in his basic upgrades, an exclusive gun on an upgrade path, a new Jet-pack and gun as part of his other upgrade path, a new set of armor for his Soul Gem upgrade and another new set of armor and new guns as part of each of his two Wow Pow upgrades.

In Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, Jet-Vac's Awakened Form gains mechanical wings on his jetpack, much bigger than his Hurricane Jet-Vac counterpart, and his blaster also has a similar set of wing designs.

He is the only Skylander to have two legendary counterparts. He is one of the only three Skylanders whose alt deco has a reposed counterpart (the other two are Spyro and Stealth Elf). Unlike the other two, he's the only one without a Dark counterpart.

Skylanders Giants - Meet the Skylanders - Jet-Vac (Hawk and Awe)
Skylanders Giants - Jet-Vac's Soul Gem Preview (Hawk and Awe)
Skylanders Swap Force - Meet the Skylanders - Turbo Jet Vac (Hawk and Awe)
Meet the Skylanders Full Blast Jet Vac

gameplay: Jet-Vac attacks by shooting air blasts out of his vacuum device, and his secondary attack is that he can also use his vacuum device to suck up the treasures and enemies in the surroundings. He also can fly with his vacuum device. In Skylanders: Battlecast, Jet-Vac can also make the enemy attack itself in a tornado or the scrapped Hurticane; his special ability is Erratic Vortex, swapping in a random enemy, and his signature gear is the Duplicator Mark II, which copies spells from the enemy. In Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, Jet-Vac is a support class character.

basic.name: Vac-Blaster
basic.content: Press Attack 1 to shoot enemies with a powerful blast of air.

basic.name: Suction Gun
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to suck enemies into the spinning fan blades.

basic_upgrades.name: Fiester Fan
basic_upgrades.content: Bigger spinning fans blades on the Suction Gun do increased damage to enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Jet-Vac Jet Pack
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to fly and perform new attacks in the air.

basic_upgrades.name: Turbine Suction Fan
basic_upgrades.content: Suction Gun attacks do even more increased damage.

soulgems.name: Eagle-Air Battle Gear
soulgems.content: Jet-Vac gets enhanced armor and a pretty sweet visor.

wow_pows.name: Shoot the Breeze!
wow_pows.content: Hold Attack 1 to charge up the Vac Blaster, then release to release a gigantic tornado.

wow_pows.name: Double Barrel
wow_pows.content: While flying, swap the Vac Blaster for two superpowered guns and hold Attack 1 to fire continuously until they overheat.

abilities.name: Piercing Winds
abilities.content: Vac Blaster does even more increased damage and pierces multiple enemies.

abilities.name: Super Suction Air Blaster
abilities.content: Suck up enemies with the Suction Gun and it gives the Vac Blaster a super shot.

abilities.name: Tank Reserves
abilities.content: Can remain in flight longer and recharge faster.

abilities.name: The Mulcher
abilities.content: Suction Gun attacks do maximum damage.

abilities.name: Flying Corkscrew
abilities.content: While flying, Press Attack 2 to blast forward and perform a powerful corkscrew attack.
